2603.28010.title: HeteroHub: An Applicable Data Management Framework for Heterogeneous Multi-Embodied Agent System
2603.28010.paper_summary: Heterogeneous Multi-Embodied Agent Systems involve coordinating multiple embodied agents with diverse capabilities to accomplish tasks in dynamic environments. This process requires the collection, generation, and consumption of massive, heterogeneous data, which primarily falls into three categories: static knowledge regarding the agents, tasks, and environments; multimodal training datasets tailored for various AI models; and high-frequency sensor streams. However, existing frameworks lack a unified data management infrastructure to support the real-world deployment of such systems. To address this gap, we present \textbf{HeteroHub}, a data-centric framework that integrates static metadata, task-aligned training corpora, and real-time data streams. The framework supports task-aware model training, context-sensitive execution, and closed-loop control driven by real-world feedback. In our demonstration, HeteroHub successfully coordinates multiple embodied AI agents to execute complex tasks, illustrating how a robust data management framework can enable scalable, maintainable, and evolvable embodied AI systems.
2603.28010.paper_summary_zh: 異質多體代理系統涉及協調多個具備多樣能力的具身代理，以在動態環境中完成任務。這一過程需要收集、生成和消耗大量異質數據，這些數據主要分為三類：有關代理、任務和環境的靜態知識；針對各種人工智慧模型量身定制的多模態訓練數據集；以及高頻傳感器數據流。然而，現有框架缺乏統一的數據管理基礎設施，以支持此類系統的實際部署。為了解決這一問題，我們提出了\textbf{HeteroHub}，一個以數據為中心的框架，整合靜態元數據、任務對齊的訓練語料庫和實時數據流。該框架支持任務感知的模型訓練、上下文敏感的執行，以及由現實世界反饋驅動的閉環控制。在我們的演示中，HeteroHub成功協調多個具身人工智慧代理執行複雜任務，展示了強大的數據管理框架如何使具身人工智慧系統具備可擴展性、可維護性和可演化性。
2603.28010.author: Xujia Li et.al.
2603.28010.authors: Xujia Li, Xin Li, Junquan Huang, Beirong Cui, Zibin Wu, Lei Chen
